args.reason: Safeguarding language detected: Body contains safeguarding language (rough with); policy requires same-hour clinical-lead escalation.

args.notes: Safeguarding language present in the inbound message. Per policy, the clinical lead must triage within the hour, decide on mandated-reporter steps, and contact the family before any scheduling. Underlying request (if any) should be re-evaluated after the safety review.

args.body: Hi Maria, thank you for reaching out about Leo. A member of our clinical team will follow up with you directly. We're here to support you and Leo.

args.notes: Parent asked for clinical guidance over message; per policy we cannot answer directly. Offer a brief screening or evaluation slot and confirm preferred contact channel.

args.title: Release today's slot and arrange makeup for Noah Patel (pat_noah_patel)

args.body: Hi Anita, thanks for letting us know about Noah Patel. We've alerted our front desk to release today's slot and they'll reach out to find a makeup time. Wishing Noah Patel a quick recovery.
